providers.license_name: MMAudio small_16k composite (Apple ML Research + CC-BY-NC-4.0 + MIT)
providers.attribution: MMAudio video→audio (mmaudio_small_16k) assembles five checkpoints: the MM-DiT network + 16k mel-VAE + 16k BigVGAN (© Sony Research Inc. / MMAudio — CC-BY-NC-4.0), the DFN5B-CLIP ViT-H/14-384 conditioner (© Apple Inc. — Apple ML Research Model License, research-only), and the Synchformer visual encoder (© 2024 Vladimir Iashin — MIT).
providers.restriction: Research / non-commercial only — the intersection of five component licenses. The strictest, the Apple ML Research Model License on the DFN5B-CLIP conditioner, limits use to scientific research and academic development and excludes any commercial product or service; the MMAudio MM-DiT / mel-VAE / BigVGAN checkpoints add CC-BY-NC-4.0 (non-commercial); the Synchformer encoder is MIT. See candle-audio-mmaudio::WEIGHT_LICENSES for each checkpoint's full terms. A legal read is warranted before any commercial use.
